problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
